body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
This PR adds two benchmark configs for our performance target amip simulation (prognostic EDMF + 1M + integrated land), with 16 and 30 horizontal elements. They run for 40 steps, with radiation being called every 20 steps. There is no atmosphere diagnostics / io. 

Example build [here](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-cpu-gpu-benchmarks/builds/266#_) (This build ran for 2 hours, and one of them was unstable.) 

One question I have is that the coupler sypd in the log changes a lot during the first few days to weeks (e.g. see the log of this [build](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-coarse-nightly-amip/builds/618#019a9e83-cb9b-41a5-92a8-dfd29719f6da)), so I don't know if a few steps is ok?

## To-do

- Proposed task
-->

- Solution implemented
-->

title: add benchmark configs for flagship amip

body:
Temporary fix for prognostic edmfx breakages + compat issues in nightly AMIP builds. 
Buildkite results : 
https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-coarse-nightly-amip/builds/618#019a9e83-cb9a-424b-8e2c-25ab93fdb2d6
title: Pin SF to pre-release(0.14.0) commit for nightly AMIP pipeline.
